def negative_sqlmodel_unbounded_select_in_handler():
    rule_id = "sqlmodel_unbounded_select_in_handler"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Handlers execute SQLModel select().all() paths without visible limits or pagination."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
